title: Custom Plastic Signs - 3 mm or 6 mm | Banners.com
metaDescription: Order Custom 3 mm or 6 mm Sintra Signs Online! Long Term Indoor & Outdoor Advertising! Sintra Signs are great for opening new doors and gaining more foot traffic for your business.

visibleText: The Banner Experts Since 2001 We are here for you online 24/7! Live customer service hours are Monday–Friday 8AM–4PM CST Contact Us Call Toll Free: 866.419.7446 Customer Service: 320.391.5300 Create an Account Login Toggle navigation Home Banners Vinyl Banners Fabric Banners Mesh Banners Double Sided Banners Pole Banners Standard Size Banners Oversized Banners Canvas Banners Economy Banners Text Only Banners Step & Repeat Banners Championship Banners Fence Banners Sports Banners Vertical Banners Large Vinyl Banners Birthday Banners Sticker Banners Table Banners Flags Custom Flags Standard 3x5 Flags Feather Flags Rectangle Flags Tear Drop Flags Base Replacements Signs Custom Signs Yard Signs Die Cut Yard Signs Custom Sized Yard Signs Sintra Signs Styrene Signs Polymetal Signs Magnetic Signs A-Frame Signs Magnets Custom Magnets Magnetic Signs Truck Magnets Car Magnets Fridge Magnets Photo Magnets Dry Erase Magnets Business Magnets Bumper Magnets Decals Window Decals 3M Controltac Decals Hi-Performance Decals Calendered Vinyl Decals Bumper Stickers Reflective Decals Floor Decals Window Perf Wall Decals Die-Cut Stickers Custom Car Stickers Custom Sticker Sheets Custom Warning Labels Translucent Adhesive Vinyl Translucent Backlit Film Trade Shows Table Covers Retractable Banners Banner Stands Backdrops Business Cards More Accessories & Hardware Postcards Poster Paper StikPics Table Tents Translucent Materials Custom Wallpaper Yard Letter and Number Signs Custom T-shirts Uses Business Signs Church Signs Coming Soon Signs Construction Signs Election Signs Farmer's Market Signs Government Signs Graduation Signs Now Hiring Signs Outdoor Signs Real Estate Signs Restaurant Signs Trade Show Displays Support Help Center & Support Custom Quote Videos Customer Care Track My Order Contact Us Customer Login HomeCustom SignsSintra Signs Sintra Signs Custom Sintra Signs Product Overview Customer Images ** All sintra signs over 32" x 48" in any direction will be shipped via freight. To order sintra signs over 32" x 48", visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service represetatives at: 320-391-5300. The maximum print size is 4' x 8'. ** Material Sintra Sign Material Sintra signs are printed on either a 3 mm or 6 mm thick material. Sintra is a rigid material and can be router-cut to any shape. Some common uses for sintra signs are advertising signage, business presentation displays, menus, promotional cutouts, sign frames and more. Printing The signs are printed in full color with a full bleed, which means the color goes all the way to the edge of the sign. Sizes All sintra signs over 32"x48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are shipped via freight. To order sintra signs over 32"x48", visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service represetatives at: 320-391-5300. The maximum print size is 4'x8'. Finishing Options Standard finishing for Sintra signs is square cut. You may also select: • Square cut standard • Shape cuts available when you work with a customer service representaitve • Single or double sided signs Artwork Artwork Guidelines Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps— with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you. Artwork/Order Proofs If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval. Color Match Proof System If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative. Production Times Production Time Tables We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order. 2 Business Days Express: Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you! Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day, Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information, Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time. Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given. 3 Business Days Standard: This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day, Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information, Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time. Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given. 5 Business Days Saver: If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day, Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information, Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time. Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given. Payment All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.. We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order. Shipping General Shipping Guidelines If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States. You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped. Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders. After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package. Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent. Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery. Please visit our shipping information page for more information about our sintra sign shipping times. Banners.com ships throughout the United States and Internationally. Please
